AxReportDesign.Name: ReportGFAM
AxReportDesign.Text: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <Report xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/sqlserver/reporting/2016/01/reportdefinition" xmlns:rd="http://schemas.microsoft.com/SQLServer/reporting/reportdesigner"> <AutoRefresh>0</AutoRefresh> <DataSources> <DataSource Name="AutoGen__ReportDataProvider"> <Transaction>true</Transaction> <ConnectionProperties> <DataProvider>AXREPORTDATAPROVIDER</DataProvider> <ConnectString /> <IntegratedSecurity>true</IntegratedSecurity> </ConnectionProperties> <rd:DataSourceID>6bdcdca9-0e1e-4256-b6df-7a91b3414615</rd:DataSourceID> </DataSource> </DataSources> <DataSets> <DataSet Name="AssetAgeingDataSet"> <Query> <DataSourceName>AutoGen__ReportDataProvider</DataSourceName> <QueryParameters> <QueryParameter Name="AX_PartitionKey"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_PartitionKey.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_CompanyName"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_CompanyName.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_UserContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_UserContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RenderingCulture"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RenderingCulture.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_ReportContext"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_ReportContext.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AX_RdpPreProcessedId"> <Value>=Parameters!AX_RdpPreProcessedId.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> <QueryParameter Name="AsOfDate"> <Value>=Parameters!DataSet1_AsOfDate.Value</Value> </QueryParameter> </QueryParameters> <CommandText>SELECT * FROM ETGAssetAgeingDP.ETGAssetAgeingTmp</CommandText> <rd:UseGenericDesigner>true</rd:UseGenericDesigner> </Query> <Fields> <Field Name="ETGAssetCondition"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetCondition</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssetName"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetName</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssetTechInfo1"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetTechInfo1</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssetTechInfo2"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetTechInfo2</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssetTechInfo3"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetTechInfo3</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssetsAging"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssetsAging</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGAssignedDate"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGAssignedDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGCapexNumber"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGCapexNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGContact"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGContact</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGCountry"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGCountry</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDepartment"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGDepartment</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGDocuments"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGDocuments</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGEmailId"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGEmailId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGEntity"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGEntity</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGFixedAssetNumber"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGFixedAssetNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGMake"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGMake</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGModel"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGModel</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGPresentUser"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGPresentUser</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGPurchaseDate"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGPurchaseDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGSerialNumber"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGSerialNumber</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserDate"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserDate</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserDate1"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserDate1</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserDate2"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserDate2</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.DateTime</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserId"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserId</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserId1"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserId1</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGUserId2"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGUserId2</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> <Field Name="ETGVerticle"> <DataField>ETGAssetAgeingTmp.1.ETGVerticle</DataField> <rd:TypeName>System.String</rd:TypeName> </Field> </Fields> <rd:DataSetInfo> <rd:DataSetName>AssetAgeingDataSet</rd:DataSetName> <rd:TableName>Fields</rd:TableName> <rd:TableAdapterFillMethod>Fill</rd:TableAdapterFillMethod> <rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod>GetData</rd:TableAdapterGetDataMethod> <rd:TableAdapterName>FieldsTableAdapter</rd:TableAdapterName> </rd:DataSetInfo> </DataSet> </DataSets> <ReportSections> <ReportSection> <Body> <ReportItems> <Textbox Name="Textbox60"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value EvaluationMode="Constant">Total assets count:</Value> <Style> <FontSize>9pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox60</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.82639in</Top> <Height>0.25in</Height> <Width>1.11111in</Width> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox61"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>=Count(Fields!ETGFixedAssetNumber.Value, "AssetAgeingDataSet")</Value> <Style> <FontSize>9pt</FontSize> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style> <TextAlign>Left</TextAlign> </Style> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox61</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.82639in</Top> <Left>1.11111in</Left> <Height>0.25in</Height> <Width>0.59027in</Width> <ZIndex>1</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Textbox Name="Textbox51"> <CanGrow>true</CanGrow> <KeepTogether>true</KeepTogether> <Paragraphs> <Paragraph> <TextRuns> <TextRun> <Value>Asset aging report</Value> <Style> <FontSize>14pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox51</rd:DefaultName> <Top>0.18056in</Top> <Left>3.47444in</Left> <Height>0.36111in</Height> <Width>1.875in</Width> <ZIndex>2</ZIndex> <Style> <Border> <Style>None</Style> </Border> <PaddingLeft>2pt</PaddingLeft> <PaddingRight>2pt</PaddingRight> <PaddingTop>2pt</PaddingTop> <PaddingBottom>2pt</PaddingBottom> </Style> </Textbox> <Tablix Name="Tablix1"> <TablixBody> <TablixColumns> <TablixColumn> <Width>1in</Width> </TablixColumn> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox45</rd:DefaultName> <Style> <Border> <Value>Vertical</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs> <rd:DefaultName>Textbox49</rd:DefaultName> <TextRun> <Value EvaluationMode="Constant">Entity</Value> <Style> <FontSize>8pt</FontSize> <FontWeight>Bold</FontWeight> </Style> </TextRun> </TextRuns> <Style /> </Paragraph> </Paragraphs>
